Title: Square Value
Problem_Statement: Write a function to return square of n. Read n and print square.

Title: Maximum Two
Problem_Statement: Write a function to return max of two integers. Read a b and print max.

Title: Sum Three
Problem_Statement: Write a function to return sum of three integers. Read a b c and print sum.

Title: Even Flag
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning 1 if even else 0. Read n and print result.

Title: Digit Sum
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning sum of digits. Read non-negative n and print result.

Title: Cube Value
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning cube of n. Read n and print cube.

Title: Minimum Two
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning min of two integers. Read a b and print min.

Title: Absolute Value
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning absolute value. Read n and print abs(n).

Title: Is Positive
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning 1 if n > 0 else 0. Read n and print result.

Title: Double Value
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning 2*n. Read n and print result.

Title: Power Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function to compute base^exp. Read base exp (>=0) and print result.

Title: GCD Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function to compute GCD of two positive integers. Read a b and print GCD.

Title: Array Sum Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function taking array and length, returning sum. Read n and n integers, print sum.

Title: Array Max Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function taking array and length, returning max. Read n and n integers, print max.

Title: Reverse Array Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function to reverse array in place. Read n and n integers, print reversed array.

Title: Factorial Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function computing factorial of n (0 to 12). Read n and print result.

Title: Is Prime Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning 1 if prime else 0. Read positive n and print result.

Title: Fibonacci Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning nth Fibonacci number (0th=0, 1st=1). Read n and print result.

Title: Count Vowels Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function taking string and returning vowel count. Read lowercase word and print count.

Title: Average Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function taking array and length, returning integer average. Read n and n integers, print average.

Title: Matrix Multiplication
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program using functions to read two matrices A (M x N) and B (P x Q) and compute product if compatible.
Read M N then M*N integers. Read P Q then P*Q integers. If N != P print 'Incompatible'. Else print resultant matrix row by row (space separated elements).

Title: Matrix Operations 2D
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program using functions readmat(), rowsum(), colsum(), totsum() and printmat() for 2D array A.
Read R C then R*C integers. Output exact format:
Row Sums: <space separated sum of each row>
Col Sums: <space separated sum of each col>
Total Sum: <sum of all elements>
Test1_Output:
Row Sums: 3 7
Col Sums: 4 6
Total Sum: 10
Test2_Output:
Row Sums: 3 6
Col Sums: 3 3 3
Total Sum: 9
Test3_Output:
Row Sums: 60
Col Sums: 10 20 30
Total Sum: 60
Test4_Output:
Row Sums: 5 5 5
Col Sums: 15
Total Sum: 15
Test5_Output:
Row Sums: 0 0
Col Sums: 0 0
Total Sum: 0
Test6_Output:
Row Sums: 3 7
Col Sums: 4 6
Total Sum: 10
Test7_Output:
Row Sums: 3 6
Col Sums: 3 3 3
Total Sum: 9
Test8_Output:
Row Sums: 60
Col Sums: 10 20 30
Total Sum: 60
Test9_Output:
Row Sums: 5 5 5
Col Sums: 15
Total Sum: 15
Test10_Output:
Row Sums: 0 0
Col Sums: 0 0
Total Sum: 0

Title: Linear Search Function
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to perform a linear search for a given key integer in a single dimensional array of numbers and report success or failure using functions.
Read N, N integers, then Key. Print 'Success: Element found' or 'Failure: Element not found'.

Title: Bubble Sort Function Choice
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to implement bubble sort technique using function to sort N integers in ascending/descending as per user preference.
Read integer choice (1 for Ascending, 2 for Descending), then N, then N integers. Print sorted array space separated.

Title: Recursive Fibonacci
Problem_Statement: Write a recursive function for nth Fibonacci number. Read n and print result.

Title: Recursive Factorial
Problem_Statement: Write a recursive function for factorial. Read n (0 to 12) and print result.

Title: Matrix Trace Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning trace of square matrix. Read N then N*N integers of matrix, print trace.

Title: Prime Range Count Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function counting primes in range [start, end]. Read start end, print count.

Title: Second Min Function
Problem_Statement: Write a function returning second smallest distinct element. Read n and n distinct integers, print second min.
